name: ID
columnRules: Format: US{N}-{N} (e.g., US10-1, US11-5). Sequential within each User Story. Empty for US header rows.

name: Test Scenarios
columnRules: Descriptive test title. Starts with action verb or noun phrase. Max ~80 chars. US header rows use format 'US{N}. {Title}' with no ID.

name: Items for Pivot Table
columnRules: AC traceability. Format: US{N} / AC{N} or US{N} / AC{N}, AC{N} for multi-AC coverage. Links testcase to spec. Prefer multi-AC mapping when workflow spans entry point + field behavior. Every test maps to ALL ACs it verifies.

name: Step
columnRules: Numbered steps: 1. Action\n2. Action\n... Actions use verbs: Navigate, Click, Verify, Type, Enter, Select, Wait, Ensure, Hover, Create. Steps include both actions AND verifications inline. UI elements not wrapped in brackets. Target 5-8 steps. Chain progressive verifications into one test rather than splitting.

name: Test Data
columnRules: Only show input data (not precondition). Free text with specific concrete values (names, dates, times, counts). Use \n for multi-line. Include exact test values, not abstract placeholders.

name: Expected
columnRules: Bullet list starting with '- '. Each bullet is one assertion. Multiple assertions per row allowed. Describes observable outcomes with concrete values matching test data. Typically 4-8 assertions for consolidated tests. Include assertions for ALL mapped ACs.
